expectations.text: All color values use hsl() notation exclusively (not hex or rgb)
expectations.evidence: 0 hsl() uses; 134 hex color values — uses Tailwind-style hex palette (e.g. --color-primary-500: #3b82f6)

expectations.text: Defines at least 5 distinct shades of the primary blue (light to dark)
Includes a neutral grey scale with at least 4 shades
expectations.evidence: --color-neutral-50 through --color-neutral-800: 8+ shades of neutral grey defined

expectations.text: Includes semantic colors for at least success (green) and danger/error (red)
expectations.evidence: Semantic color section with success, warning, error/danger variables present
